violations.text: An allergen awareness statement was not observed visible to customers at the food service/buffet area. An allergen statement is to be provided and/or posted for customer viewing and awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Hotel management is to ensure someone certified in food safety is on site at all times when foods are being handled, prepared, and serviced. Per the PIC, person certified in food safety was on vacation at time of inspection. Per the PIC, there are plans for additional employees to be certified in food safety. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

At the time of inspection, a person certified in food safety was not present as needed (individual out sick). A person certified in food safety is to be on site at all times when time/temperature control for safety foods are being prepared, handled, and/or served. (Per hotel management, several employees are to be enrolled in food safety course to ensure someone is on site as required.) New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. A full-time employee is to successfully complete a food safety course and test and apply for the Certified Food Safety Manager License through the RIDOH CFP as soon as possible. Application emailed to PIC at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. A full-time employee is to successfully complete a food safety course and test and apply for the Certified Food Safety Manager License through the RIDOH CFP as soon as possible. Application emailed to PIC at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils (Coffee dispensing equipment) after washing and rinsing them in the 3-bay sink. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Per the PIC, bleach is to be obtained for proper sanitizing at the 3-bay sink until Quaternary Ammonium can be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

No person in charge that is certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. The establishment is to ensure there is a person on site certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per the PIC at the time of inspection, food safety certificate is expired and food safety class and test are to be taken. Class and test are to be successfully completed as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. A full-time employee is to successfully complete a food safety course and test and apply for the Certified Food Safety Manager License through the RIDOH CFP as soon as possible. Application emailed to PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0-100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 - 400 ppm. Per the PIC, new replacement chemical is on order. All equipment/utensils are to be sanitized in the high temp. dish machine until chemical for the 3 a bay sink is available on site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Several food items at the food buffet line area were observed held at 48 to 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Based on time out of refrigeration and/or temperature of the food items, foods were moved to colder refrigeration or voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Single Use Utensils stored at the buffet line were observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
Boxes of single use items were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage room. Single use items are to be stored at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024

Cheese and yogurt were observed held at 55-58 degrees Fahrenheit at the buffet station in a "cold bowl/container". Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, foods were put in the buffet line under 2 hours prior to inspection. At the time of inspection, PIC elected to dispose of foods. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
